text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Thanks to the favorable results we achieved in
the practice match, the team's motivation shoots
up significantly.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Little Cocon and Bitter Glasse stop by to watch
our training and start fearing that they'll lose
against us if they only do as Ms. Kashimoto says.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If our team's rallying cause is friendship, then
theirs will be their trainer, Ms. Kashimoto.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Shortly after, Ms. Kashimoto stumbles upon Team
Zenith doing supplementary training without her
approval.
